title: Ælla becomes King of Northumbria
fact: Ælla was King of Northumbria, a kingdom in early medieval England, during the middle of the 9th century.

title: Eric Bloodaxe becomes King of Northumbria
fact: Eric Haraldsson, nicknamed Bloodaxe and Brother-Slayer, was a Norwegian king.

title: Oswald of Northumbria becomes King of Northumbria
fact: Oswald was King of Northumbria from 634 until his death, and is venerated as a saint, of whom there was a particular cult in the Middle Ages.

title: Æthelwold of Wessex becomes King of Northumbria
fact: Æthelwold or Æthelwald was the younger of two known sons of Æthelred I, King of Wessex from 865 to 871.

title: Edwin of Northumbria becomes King of Northumbria
fact: Edwin, also known as Eadwine or Æduinus, was the King of Deira and Bernicia – which later became known as Northumbria – from around 616 until his death.

title: Æthelfrith of Northumbria becomes King of Northumbria
fact: Æthelfrith was King of Bernicia from c. 593 until his death around 616 AD at the Battle of the River Idle.

title: Osberht becomes King of Northumbria
fact: Osberht was king of Northumbria in the middle of the 9th century.

title: Aldfrith becomes King of Northumbria
fact: Aldfrith was king of Northumbria from 685 until his death.
